title: tina tropical change approaches
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target. Image 2 supports Tina identity and candy appearance only. Preserve the exact Tina, wardrobe, car interior, camera relationship, and foreground product from Image 1. Change only the exterior beyond the window. The far end of the ordinary gray Los Angeles block has become a lush tropical world and the transformation is moving toward the car: pavement cracks release glossy leaves, hedges begin growing luminous mangoes, and jewel-colored flowers climb one house while the nearest house remains normal. Make the progression from dull foreground street to verdant distance unmistakable. Tina is still unaware. Photoreal cinematic VFX concept frame, restrained and appetizing, no candyland, no cartoon fruit faces, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
